headline: 3 Big Reasons to Love Cencora (COR)
summary: Over the past six months, Cencora’s stock price fell to $287.06. Shareholders have lost 15.8% of their capital, which is disappointing considering the S&P 500 has climbed by 6.2%. This was partly due to its softer quarterly results and may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.

headline: 2 Large-Cap Stocks Worth Your Attention and 1 We Brush Off
summary: Large-cap stocks are known for their staying power and ability to weather market storms better than smaller competitors. However, their sheer size makes it more challenging to maintain high growth rates as they’ve already captured significant portions of their markets.
